case_title: TONG, MILLARD vs. WILEY, LA TOYA R. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2770 SAN BRUNO AVE #2, LEASE FORFEITED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION GRANTED JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R. STAYED UNTIL JUL-18-2000, $75.18 DEPOSITED AS RENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, MILLARD SERVED JUN-15-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WILEY, LA TOYA R.

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $75.18 FOR TRANSACTION 8711P1100000 (EX PARTE MOTION), PAYABLE TO MILLARD TONG, WARRANT #00091035, DATED AUG-10-2000
